original_prompt: 给这个手串做一张淘宝主图，要求深色背景的女性高级礼盒面板或者放点黑白的玫瑰，主文案：透光如星 驱散浊气  副文案：平安顺遂 白水晶
optimized_prompt:
[
  {
    "nano_banana_en": "[Visual Description]
Modern Chinese E-commerce Jewelry Photography, Luxury High-End Vibe. A premium beaded bracelet made of 12-14mm perfectly round, highly transparent clear quartz beads is centered on a dark velvet jewelry box cushion. The beads exhibit distinct refractive qualities, like optical glass, with visible internal stringing channels creating a horizontal line through the circle. Surrounding props include artistic black and white roses, adding a touch of gothic elegance and contrast. The background is a deep, rich dark charcoal or midnight blue studio setting, creating a mysterious atmosphere. Lighting is focused and sharp (Commercial Studio Lighting), highlighting the vitreous luster and specular highlights on the beads, making them sparkle against the dark textures.

[Text & UI Layout]
***Layout Style**: Top-Bottom Standard (Classic Taobao Main Image Layout).
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: "透光如星 驱散浊气". Position: [Top Right Negative Space]. Style: [3D Metallic Silver or Glowing White Serif Font, Elegant and Sharp].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: "平安顺遂 白水晶". Style: [Minimalist Sans-serif, white with slight transparency, smaller than main title].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: "天然优选". Style: [Thin Gold Line Border, Minimalist Luxury].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: "甄选好礼". Style: [Small Gold Seal Icon].",
    "seadream_cn": "[Visual Description]
现代中国电商珠宝首饰场景，高级暗调商业摄影风格。画面中央是一串由12-14mm高净度白水晶圆珠组成的手串，珠体通透如光学玻璃，具有强烈的折射感，内部穿孔通道清晰可见。手串静置于一个深色丝绒质感的高级礼盒软垫上。画面点缀着几朵艺术风格的黑白玫瑰（单色调花卉），营造出静谧而神秘的氛围。背景为深邃的暗夜黑或深灰，突出产品的纯净透亮。光线采用专业的珠宝布光，强调水晶表面的玻璃光泽和锐利的高光，让珠子在深色背景中如星辰般闪耀。

[Text & UI Layout]
***Layout Style**: 上文下图经典布局 (Top-Bottom Standard).
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: 内容: “透光如星 驱散浊气”. 位置: [画面右上角留白处]. 风格: [3D立体金属银色宋体或发光白字体，带有高级衬线].
2. **Sub Title**: 内容: “平安顺遂 白水晶”. 风格: [干净利落的无衬线体，白色，字号略小于主标题].
3. **Marketing Banner**: 内容: “天然优选”. 风格: [极简金色细线边框].
4. **Trust Badge**: 内容: “甄选好礼”. 风格: [半透明磨砂质感印章].",
    "layout_logic": "Dark backgrounds require bright text. Place the bracelet slightly lower-center to allow ample space at the top for the main copy. The white quartz beads will naturally pop against the dark velvet/roses. Ensure the 'Internal Stringing Channel' mentioned in the subject lock is visible to imply transparency."
  }
]
